channel.title: Unity-Blog on Daily Tech Articles Feed
channel.description: Recent content in Unity-Blog on Daily Tech Articles Feed

item.title: The hidden costs of traditional 3D tools and the smarter way to build interactive experiences
item.description: 3D visualization is becoming essential for various industries, but many teams face challenges due to traditional tools that come with hidden costs. Key issues include developer bottlenecks, long iteration cycles, and expensive software ecosystems. These factors slow down innovation and increase costs. However, no-code tools like Unity Studio offer a solution, enabling teams to create interactive 3D experiences quickly and efficiently without programming skills. This shift allows designers and…

item.title: Rendering at 500 km/h in Gear.Club Unlimited 3
item.description: 🚗💨 Eden Games has unveiled Gear.Club Unlimited 3, a high-speed arcade racer that maintains 60 fps while streaming vast environments at speeds nearing 500 km/h. Set to release on February 19, 2026, this title showcases their advanced custom rendering pipeline, debuting on the Nintendo Switch™ 2. Key challenges included ensuring stable performance and optimizing for new hardware. The team emphasizes GPU-driven rendering to enhance environment complexity without sacrificing frame rates….

item.title: 10 questions to ask before starting your first 3D project
item.description: 🌟 Ready to embark on your first 3D project? Here are 10 essential questions to guide your planning: 1️⃣ What is your project’s purpose? 2️⃣ How will you measure success? 3️⃣ Who is your target audience? 4️⃣ What level of interactivity do you need? 5️⃣ What assets do you already have? 6️⃣ What are your team’s technical skills? 7️⃣ What is your timeline and budget? 8️⃣ What tools will you use? 9️⃣ How will you gather feedback? 🔟 How will you share your project? Proper planning is key to…

item.title: The challenge of interactive writing: Designing a nonlinear RPG like Esoteric Ebb
item.description: 🎮 Discover the journey behind the creation of “Esoteric Ebb,” a nonlinear RPG that’s captivating players on Steam! Christoffer Bodegård shares insights into the complexities of interactive writing and the challenges of maintaining a branching narrative over eight years. Key elements include a high choice-to-text ratio and dynamic content, ensuring player engagement through meaningful decisions. 🗣️✨ The tool of choice? Ink script, which allows for efficient dialog management. Learn more about…

item.title: Kinetic Publishing: Indie teams get guidance from the Phasmophobia team
item.description: Kinetic Games, the team behind the hit game Phasmophobia, has launched Kinetic Publishing to support indie developers. 🎮 They aim to provide funding and essential guidance in marketing and operations. With over 300 submissions, they’re looking for creativity and passion in potential partners. Daniel Knight emphasizes the importance of genuine enthusiasm in game development. Their goal is to share their expertise and help other teams succeed. 🌟 #IndieGameDev #KineticPublishing #Phasmophobia…

item.title: The Redesigned Offerwall Monetization Dashboard: What’s New and Next
item.description: 🚀 Tapjoy has launched a redesigned offerwall publisher dashboard to enhance monetization for publishers. Key features include: - Advanced data analysis tools - New app-level metrics like Daily Active Users (DAU) - A streamlined Placement Page for better management - Simplified A/B testing flow The new dashboard is available now for all partners. Log in to explore the updates! 🔍📊 #Tapjoy #Monetization #Dashboard #Publishers #GameDev

item.title: 5 top trends redefining industry in 2026
item.description: 🚀 The Unity Industry Trends Report 2026 highlights five key trends transforming industries. 1️⃣ Immersive tech shifts from experiments to practical applications, enhancing efficiency in manufacturing and healthcare. 2️⃣ AI and XR combine to create intelligent experiences, elevating user interactions across sectors. 3️⃣ Immersive training is becoming essential, improving skills and safety in various fields. 4️⃣ Collaboration improves as 3D data becomes accessible to more teams, enhancing…

item.title: Unity for Humanity 2026 grant now open
item.description: 🌍 Exciting news for creators! Applications are now open for the Unity for Humanity 2026 Grant. This initiative aims to support social impact projects using real-time 3D technology. A total of $600,000 USD will be awarded to projects aligned with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). To assist applicants, two guides are available: the “Unity for Humanity: Guide for Creators” and “Examples from Past Winners.” The submission deadline is February 20, 2026, at 11:59 pm PT. For…

item.title: Games made with Unity: 2025 in review
item.description: 2025 has been a notable year for the Unity community, showcasing a variety of new titles. Noteworthy releases include Jump Space, Megabonk, and the highly anticipated Hollow Knight: Silksong. The IGF Awards celebrated several Unity games, with Consume Me winning three awards. The community was engaged through events like the Unity Awards Steam Sale. For a comprehensive list of Unity games launched in 2025, visit our Steam Curator page. 🎮✨ #Unity #GameDevelopment #IndieGames…

item.title: Games made with Unity: December 2025 in review
item.description: 🎮 December 2025 wrapped up with notable achievements at The Game Awards and the 17th Unity Awards. Congratulations to award winners like Silksong and Umamusume: Pretty Derby! 🏆 A highlight from the IGF Awards was “Consume Me,” which won three awards. Check out the latest games made with Unity launched this month, including titles like Terminator 2D: NO FATE and Rhythm Doctor. For a full list and more details, visit our Steam Curator page! #UnityGames #GameAwards #IndieGames #Unity…

item.title: Celebrating excellence: Unity Awards 2025 winners.
item.description: 🏆 The Unity Awards 2025 recognized outstanding achievements across various fields. 📅 This year’s ceremony highlighted individuals and organizations committed to promoting unity and excellence in their communities. 👏 Winners were honored for their innovative contributions and dedication to positive change. Join us in celebrating their success! #UnityAwards2025 #Excellence #CommunityImpact #CelebratingSuccess

item.title: Celebrating excellence: Unity Awards 2025 winners.
item.description: 🎉 Celebrating excellence at the 17th Unity Awards 2025! This year saw over 700 project submissions, with 14,000 voters casting more than 36,000 votes. The competition was intense, with many categories decided by narrow margins, showcasing exceptional talent in the Unity community. A big thank you to all nominees and to everyone who joined the live showcase! 🙌 #UnityAwards #Creativity #Innovation #GameDevelopment #Community

item.title: Unity 6.3 LTS is now available
item.description: 🚀 Exciting news! Unity 6.3 LTS is now available, offering two years of dedicated support and consistent updates. This release simplifies cross-platform development with the new Platform Toolkit, enhancing accessibility for developers and players alike. Key features include support for Nintendo Switch™ 2, Android XR capabilities, and improved performance and stability. For full details, check the release notes! #Unity3D #GameDev #UnityLTS #GameDevelopment #Unity6.3

item.title: Highlights from the Unite 2025 Keynote
item.description: This week, Unity developers gathered in Barcelona for Unite 2025. The Keynote featured key announcements, including new tools for game development and partnerships aimed at enhancing the gaming ecosystem. 🎮 A surprise appearance by Tim Sweeney from Epic Games highlighted collaboration efforts, such as bringing Unity games into Fortnite. New features like the Platform Toolkit and AI Gateway were also introduced to simplify development. 🚀 Unity’s commitment to supporting developers continues to…

item.title: The power of play: Unlocking growth with playables
item.description: 🎮 Playable ads are transforming user acquisition! They offer interactive mini-games that allow users to experience your app’s gameplay directly, making them active participants. Unity has enhanced playable performance, achieving smoother interactions and increased monetization on platforms like iOS. Key stats show significant gains in user engagement and revenue. 📈 Best practices include focusing on immediate user engagement, designing for various orientations, and conducting thorough…

item.title: Tailoring digital play by age: How StoryToys built the LEGO® Bluey app
item.description: 🎮 StoryToys has launched the LEGO® Bluey app, aimed at kids ages 2-4, blending fun with early learning. 👶 The development team faced challenges in designing for different age groups, focusing on varied engagement styles. Younger players explore through tapping, while older ones aim to master interactions. 🛠️ The app features 2D and 3D building experiences, allowing for skill progression. Communication relies on visual cues instead of text, promoting discovery through play. 🔧 Using Unity’s…

item.title: How Synergiz Harbor innovates student learning through mixed reality
item.description: Synergiz, founded in 2011, is enhancing student learning through its mixed reality (MR) platform, Harbor. 🎓 Harbor is a no-code software suite that allows educators to create immersive MR experiences, blending digital and physical environments. It supports multiple devices, making it versatile for various learning settings. 🌐 Recently, Bâtiment CFA Bretagne utilized Harbor for workshops in technician apprenticeships, leading to improved student engagement and practical skills. Feedback from…

item.title: Split-screen and GameShare networking in Survival Kids
item.description: 🌟 Exciting news from Unity and KONAMI! This summer, they launched Survival Kids, a fresh take on a classic game, exclusively for Nintendo Switch™ 2. The development team faced unique challenges while building robust multiplayer options using Unity 6. They crafted a split-screen mode and GameShare capabilities, allowing players to enjoy diverse gaming experiences. By implementing virtual input players, they ensured smooth gameplay with up to two local players, while optimizing for…

item.title: Inside the Survival Kids multiplayer network infrastructure
item.description: 🚀 This summer, Survival Kids launched on Nintendo Switch™ 2, built on Unity 6. A small, experienced team of about 10 developers led the project, utilizing their extensive knowledge to navigate challenges effectively. 🕹️ The game’s multiplayer network supports various play styles: single-player, local co-op, and online. Unique features like GameShare allow players to connect across devices. 💡 The team utilized Netcode for Entities, enabling flexible multiplayer experiences. Their focus on…

item.title: How Unity Audience Hub helps marketers reach mobile gaming audiences and gains industry recognition
item.description: Unity Audience Hub is transforming how marketers engage with mobile gaming audiences while prioritizing privacy. 🎮✨ This innovative platform integrates insights from Unity’s ad ecosystem with third-party data, enabling custom audience building across mobile and CTV channels. Unity has recently been recognized as the “Best Mobile Games Marketing Platform” at the MarTech Breakthrough Awards, highlighting its commitment to effective and privacy-conscious marketing solutions. 🏆 Learn more about…

item.title: Games made with Unity: August 2025 in review
item.description: 🎮 August 2025 showcased a diverse range of games made with Unity, from the roguelite Starlight Re:Volver to the cozy Tiny Bookshop. 🏆 Congratulations to the IGF finalists and winners, especially Consume Me for their three awards! 📅 Check out the latest Unity games on our Steam Curator page and share your projects with us! #UnityGames #IndieDev #GameAwards #GameDevelopment #Unity3D

item.title: Graphics and rendering tips from Survival Kids
item.description: 🚀 This summer, Unity launched the co-op game “Survival Kids,” developed in-house with a small team. With limited resources, they focused on innovative graphics and rendering techniques. 🌟 Using the Universal Render Pipeline, they balanced artistic goals with performance needs. Custom shaders and dynamic lighting were key to achieving their visual style. 🌊 The ocean rendering was inspired by existing projects, utilizing signed distance fields for unique effects. Stay tuned for more insights on…
